title: 50-12oz (340ml) Disposable Biodegradable & Compostable Paper Coffee Cups with Compostable Sip Lids (12oz (340Ml) 50 Pack)
features: DISPOSABLE Paper Coffee Hot Cups With White Sip Lids
SUITABLE for all hot drinks such as Coffee, Tea, Hot Chocolate Milk etc.

description: 50 12oz (340ml) Disposable Biodegradable & Compostable Ingeo Paper Coffee Cups With White Compostable Sip Lids. These paper coffee cups are 100% compostable and biodegradable so they are very eco friendly. They are available in 12oz (340ml), and come packed in a sleeve of 50 cups together with a sleeve of 50 white lids. They are suitable for all types of hot drinks such as Coffee, Tea, Hot Chocolate Milk etc.
